title: Architecture & Evaluation Guide
subtitle: Analytical system for job classification and organizational design.

orgContext.title: Phase 1: Set the organizational context
orgContext.description: Configure the environment and parameters for your evaluation.

configureMarket.title: Step 1: Set the Market
configureMarket.summary: Select the country and organizational size to provide context.
bullets: Open the Dynamic Filters sidebar.
Choose the target Country (e.g., USA, Brazil).
Select the Org Size (e.g., Enterprise, Mid-market).
Notice how the dimension scales adapt to these settings.

setStream.title: Step 2: Define Career Profile
setStream.summary: Identify the functional nature of the role.
bullets: Select the Career Stream (Management, Professional, or Support).
Specify the Career Function and Job Family.
This ensures you are comparing roles accurately.

evaluation.title: Phase 2: Evaluate the role factors
evaluation.description: Evaluate the position across the 12 key dimensions.

scoreDimensions.title: Step 1: Grade Dimensions
scoreDimensions.summary: Use the interactive matrix to assign levels for each criterion.
bullets: Select the level for each of the 12 rows (Impact, Knowledge, etc.).
Review the definitions for each dimension using the 'Info' icons.
Choose the level that best describes the role's requirements.
Use the 'Show Matrix' buttons above the table for reference.

reviewCalibration.title: Step 2: Calibrate Results
bullets: Compare evaluations between similar positions side-by-side.
Check for 'grade drift' where levels might be inflated.
Use the matrix visualization to see the distribution.

results.title: Phase 3: Review the score and classification
results.description: Finalize the classification and compare with market data.

validateGrade.title: Step 1: Confirm Position Grade
validateGrade.summary: Review the final numerical score and resulting grade.
bullets: Check the 'Total Points' column for the weighted sum.
The 'Position Grade' shows the final classification (e.g., G14).
Verify that the result feels right for the organization.

marketAlignment.title: Step 2: Save Work
marketAlignment.summary: Store your evaluation for future reference.
bullets: Click 'Save Matrix' to store your progress.
Load previous calculations using 'Load Matrix'.
Export the final matrix for documentation.
